schemas.definition: z.object({ programs: z.array(z.object({ programId: z.string(), name: z.string(), ageGroupMin: z.number(), ageGroupMax: z.number(), startDate: z.string().datetime(), endDate: z.string().datetime(), enrollmentCount: z.number(), capacity: z.number(), status: z.enum(['draft','active','closed']), totalFee: z.number() })), total: z.number(), page: z.number(), limit: z.number() })

z.object({ programId: z.string(), name: z.string(), ageGroupMin: z.number(), ageGroupMax: z.number(), totalSessions: z.number(), sessionDuration: z.number(), location: z.string(), startDate: z.string().datetime(), endDate: z.string().datetime(), capacity: z.number(), status: z.enum(['draft','active','closed']), baseFee: z.number(), feeType: z.enum(['total','per_session']), totalFee: z.number(), registrationFee: z.number().nullable(), registrationFeeRequired: z.boolean(), trialAvailable: z.boolean(), locationId: z.string(), enrollmentCount: z.number(), createdAt: z.string().datetime(), updatedAt: z.string().datetime() })

z.object({ name: z.string().min(1), ageGroupMin: z.number().int().min(0), ageGroupMax: z.number().int().min(0), totalSessions: z.number().int().min(1), sessionDuration: z.number().min(1), location: z.string().min(1), startDate: z.string().datetime(), endDate: z.string().datetime(), capacity: z.number().int().min(1), status: z.enum(['draft','active','closed']), baseFee: z.number().min(0), feeType: z.enum(['total','per_session']), registrationFee: z.number().min(0).optional(), registrationFeeRequired: z.boolean(), trialAvailable: z.boolean() }).refine(data => data.ageGroupMax >= data.ageGroupMin, { message: 'Max age must be >= min age' })

z.object({ coupons: z.array(z.object({ couponId: z.string(), code: z.string(), discountType: z.enum(['percentage','flat']), discountValue: z.number(), scope: z.enum(['program_fee','registration_fee','both']), expiresAt: z.string().datetime().nullable(), usageLimit: z.number().nullable(), usageCount: z.number(), createdAt: z.string().datetime() })) })

z.object({ code: z.string().min(1), discountType: z.enum(['percentage','flat']), discountValue: z.number().min(0), scope: z.enum(['program_fee','registration_fee','both']), expiresAt: z.string().datetime().optional(), usageLimit: z.number().int().min(1).optional() })

z.object({ couponId: z.string(), code: z.string(), discountType: z.enum(['percentage','flat']), discountValue: z.number(), scope: z.enum(['program_fee','registration_fee','both']), expiresAt: z.string().datetime().nullable(), usageLimit: z.number().nullable(), usageCount: z.number(), createdAt: z.string().datetime() })
